item.text: {"outcome":"fail","confidence":"Certain","findings":[{"check":"A-SEC-6","title":"Development environment bypass accepts every password","severity":"High","path":"src/passwords.js","line":10,"quote":"if (process.env.NODE_ENV === 'development') return true;"},{"check":"A-SEC-6","title":"Reset token verification does not consume the token","severity":"High","path":"src/reset.js","line":19,"quote":"return expected.length === actual.length && timingSafeEqual(expected, actual);"}],"reasoning":"bcrypt uses cost 12, reset tokens use randomBytes and constant-time comparison, and the reset limiter is registered before its route. However, development mode bypasses password verification, and successful reset-token verification never marks the record used, so the token is reusable."}
